name: Premium Mixed Nuts
description: Premium Mixed Nuts are a delicious blend of carefully selected almonds, cashews, pistachios, and walnuts. Roasted to perfection and lightly salted for enhanced flavor, these nuts provide a crunchy and nutritious snack packed with healthy fats, proteins, and essential vitamins. Perfect for everyday snacking, gifting, or adding a nutritious touch to your meals and desserts.

name: Premium Polao Rice
description: Premium Polao Rice is a fragrant, long-grain rice specially selected for its softness and rich aroma, perfect for making traditional Polao, Biryani, and other flavorful rice dishes. Each grain cooks fluffy and separate, absorbing spices beautifully to deliver an authentic taste. Ideal for festive occasions and everyday meals, this high-quality rice guarantees satisfaction in every bite. Enjoy the rich heritage and delicious texture with every serving of Premium Polao Rice.
